text: Thank you. What has caused the swelling in Jim's body and what can be done to heal it? For the answer to this query, we must begin with the consideration of the serpent signifying wisdom. This symbol has the value of the ease of viewing the two faces of the one who is wise. May be symbolized by the poison of the fangs to use that which a mind, a body, a spirit, complex has gained of wisdom for the uses of separation is to invite the a fatal butt of that wisdom's darker side. Causes us not to dwell upon this point, but merely to specifically draw the boundaries of the metaphysical background for the energizing of a series of abytes from a one of a second identity, a species. However it is possible that were enough work done to test the origin of the pathology of the entity, it is within possibility, a probability, a limit that the testing would show the a bite of the cotton a mouth rather than the white of the common wood spider. The energizing took its place within the lymphatic system of the entities, a yellow ray, a physical, a body. Therefore the working continues. So that harsh chemical means may be taken to reawaken the histaminic reflexes of the entity and to aid in the removal of edema. That is the request of the one known. So I need a for potassium, the ingesting of the a fruit of the banana, a palm is recommended. As is meditation, it is to be noted that this entity requires some deserne in the meditation, which the others of the a group do not find necessary in the same manner. Entirely, although the instinct to share in the Hadesia plan is not always present. Each entity has its ways of viewing and learning from the illusion, and each processes catalyst using unique circuitry. Thus all need not be the same. The two be equal in will and faith.
